layout_pg_en: fixed modest teacher apartment entry-living open plan: slim shoe cabinet immediately right of door with two sneakers visible, short corridor opening into compact living-dining combo, round dining table with two mismatched chairs near kitchenette counter, sofa pushed against far wall beneath window with semi-sheer curtains, warm tungsten floor lamp washing sofa fabric, tidy minimal decor with framed student artwork crooked — identical room geometry, curtain fold and lamp cone every shot
layout_nsfw_en: fixed same teacher apartment layout as PG: curtains drawn against night, single warm lamp pool, faint kitchen LED strip off, intimate quiet air without altering furniture positions

venue.narrative_tone: 陈悦的私宅：家访、包扎、喝茶、深夜短信后续。可与「玩家的家」区分——勿把主人公公寓的杂物与动线写进此处；可有长辈短镜头经过走廊或厨房响声，避免写成彻底无人知晓的真空亲密。

cg_policy.explicit_hint: 家中更私密，但 cg_explicit 仍遵守全局：仅正文已明确裸露或性行为时才 true。

world_card_summary: 门槛内外两种温度：拖鞋、茶壶与未曾对人说过的话。
